div.p: State transitions for UowRegistryEntry — normal path and crash recovery
Critical invariant: "UoW Created" WAL record must be durable before any revision uses this UoW ID.
Free = 0: Zeroed memory is automatically Free.
WAL is authority: Registry pages are a checkpoint cache. UoW state transitions are WAL records.

ul.li: Allocation: tracks Free slots for O(1) alloc
